posts.author: Adurm (Adam Cranch)
posts.cookedHtml:
No worries. I was hoping there was a way that I could mimic the “my week” tab within monday, via the API.

for example a query, using any user id, and a start/from date to retrieve a list of task ids that are assigned and within the date range.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Adurm,

Could you please provide further detail into what you would like to query via the API? I’d love to understand what you are looking for a bit better here, as at the time I’m not quite certain as to what you’d like to achieve.

From there, we should be able to offer relevant advice, if what you’re after is possible to achieve by using the API

-Alex

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Adurm!

Since it’s been a while since we last heard from you, I’m going to close this thread.

If this issue is still persisting for you, feel free to start a new topic.

Thanks!
